summary_en: 4,875,400 shares cancelled (4.3% of pre-cancellation outstanding). Post-cancellation issued shares: 107,951,798. Effective 2026-05-14.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-14, Nippon Gas announced completion of treasury share cancellation executed pursuant to Company Law Section 178. The board of directors resolved on 2026-04-30 to proceed with the cancellation. A total of 4,875,400 ordinary shares were cancelled, representing 4.3% of issued shares outstanding prior to cancellation. Following the cancellation, total issued shares outstanding are 107,951,798.
